secuencia: 1 — ESCENA: Interior muerto del planeta + título
encuadre: vast space-wide; the planet centered and small, scattered cold stars around it.
camara: an almost imperceptible slow drift toward the world, as if the film is holding its breath.
accion: the camera approaches the serene, beautiful world with reverence; cloud bands turn slowly, light creeps across the terminator line revealing rivers of gold, everything calm, sacred, and utterly alive — the world we are about to lose.

secuencia: 1 — ESCENA: Interior muerto del planeta + título
encuadre: wide descending; the horizon-line of light splitting darkness from gold.
camara: the camera tips over the edge and falls toward the surface, plunging through luminous clouds.
accion: the descent accelerates gently through cathedral-like clouds, light blooming and scattering around the lens, the world rushing up to meet us — beauty with the faint vertigo of a fall.

secuencia: 1 — ESCENA: Interior muerto del planeta + título
encuadre: low aerial gliding fast over the living land, then locking onto the dark fissure.
camara: a sweeping forward glide that finds the scar and tilts down toward its mouth.
accion: the camera skims over forests and shining rivers full of life, then — like a thought intruding — drifts to the dry fissure and tips toward its dark throat, the warmth draining out of frame as it nears.

secuencia: 1 — ESCENA: Interior muerto del planeta + título
encuadre: vertical descent between close rock walls.
camara: a slow, steady downward dolly into darkness.
accion: the descent leaves the world of light behind, walls sliding upward past the lens, the warm thread of sky narrowing to nothing until only cold rock and shadow remain, deeper and deeper toward something wrong.

secuencia: 1 — ESCENA: Interior muerto del planeta + título
encuadre: a wide reveal opening into the empty dead core, then a slow settle into total black.
camara: the camera glides out into the void and stops, holding on nothing.
accion: the cavern opens impossibly wide and utterly empty; the camera drifts into the void where a heartbeat should be and finds dead stillness; the frame sinks to pure black and holds. Title rises: STELLA FUGAZ.

secuencia: 2 — ESCENA: El parque de la luzagua (la utopía)
encuadre: sweeping establishing wide over the utopian city.
camara: a smooth high crane drifting over the glowing canals.
accion: the camera sails over the living city — citizens crossing bright bridges, light-water curling through the streets, gardens swaying — a whole civilization at peace, breathing in gold; the camera lets us fall in love with what is about to die.

secuencia: 2 — ESCENA: El parque de la luzagua (la utopía)
encuadre: tracking medium-wide following @StellaRopa as she runs.
camara: energetic lateral tracking alongside her, grass and light streaking past.
accion: cutting from the dead black to blue sky and a peal of laughter, @StellaRopa sprints barefoot across the park, white braid snapping behind her, leaping a low rise, arms wide, pure unguarded joy in every stride as light and pollen scatter around her.

secuencia: 2 — ESCENA: El parque de la luzagua (la utopía)
encuadre: lyrical medium of hands cupping and releasing flowing light-water.
camara: a slow loving glide along the river's surface.
accion: citizens dip their hands into the luzagua and let it run through their fingers, never closing their fists, the light streaming off their palms and rejoining the river — the world's quiet law shown without a word, beautiful and serene.

secuencia: 2 — ESCENA: El parque de la luzagua (la utopía)
encuadre: medium on @StellaRopa's wrist and bright face, then a quick playful follow.
camara: snap-follow as @Gix darts upward and away.
accion: @StellaRopa taps the @Brazalete on her wrist; with a soft chime @Gix blooms out of the air like a struck spark, spirals once around her head, then zips off between the trees — and she breaks into a laughing chase, swatting playfully at the light.

secuencia: 2 — ESCENA: El parque de la luzagua (la utopía)
encuadre: medium on @VeraRopa walking calmly, @StellaRopa a bright blur in the distance.
camara: a gentle dolly keeping pace with @VeraRopa.
accion: @VeraRopa strolls unhurried behind her daughter, fond and easy, watching the small running figure with a mother's quiet pride, and calls ahead with a teasing warmth.

secuencia: 2 — ESCENA: El parque de la luzagua (la utopía)
encuadre: medium on @StellaRopa, half-turned over her shoulder mid-run.
camara: a light handheld follow keeping her grinning face in frame.
accion: @StellaRopa runs backward a few steps, turning to flash a cocky, sweet grin at her mother, chin up with the easy arrogance of a kid who has never lost anything yet.

secuencia: 2 — ESCENA: El parque de la luzagua (la utopía)
encuadre: wide; a vast shadow sweeps across @StellaRopa as she stops.
camara: a slow push as the shadow swallows her small figure.
accion: @StellaRopa skids to a stop as a huge shadow rolls over her; she lifts her gaze and the camera reveals the towering @MechaFlores — a war machine the size of a building, kneeling, its armor cracked open with flowers, petals drifting down from its shoulders like slow snow.

secuencia: 2 — ESCENA: El parque de la luzagua (la utopía)
encuadre: low-angle wide (contrapicado), wide lens; @StellaRopa tiny in the lower frame, dwarfed by the giant overhead.
camara: a slow tilt-up combined with a gentle push-in, scaling the machine.
accion: @StellaRopa cranes her neck all the way back to take in the giant, mouth slightly open, a flower spiralling down past her face; small and curious beneath the sleeping war-machine, she asks aloud, almost to herself, the question of a generation born after the wars.

secuencia: 2 — ESCENA: El parque de la luzagua (la utopía)
encuadre: tender two-shot, @VeraRopa crouching to @StellaRopa's height.
camara: a slow push into an intimate medium of their faces.
accion: @VeraRopa kneels to her daughter's level, brushing a petal from Stella's hair, her smile fading into something honest and a little sad as she answers — the first time the girl hears the weight under the legend.

secuencia: 2 — ESCENA: El parque de la luzagua (la utopía)
encuadre: medium two-shot; @VeraRopa gestures to the river, linking their faces to the flowing light.
camara: a slow dolly that ties them to the moving water.
accion: @VeraRopa scoops a handful of luzagua and lets it stream back into the river, the light pouring off her fingers, as she gives Stella the one law of their people — gentle, deliberate, planting the seed that will decide everything.

secuencia: 2 — ESCENA: El parque de la luzagua (la utopía)
encuadre: medium that ends settling on @VeraRopa alone, watching her daughter go.
camara: a slow drift to static on @VeraRopa's face.
accion: already chasing @Gix again, @StellaRopa waves and shouts over her shoulder as she runs off; @VeraRopa answers, then the camera lingers on her — a mother watching her child recede into the gold, a fond, faintly sad smile that we, and only we, know is the last of the good days.

secuencia: 3 — ESCENA: El laboratorio de Naio (la verdad y la huida)
encuadre: wide establishing of the lab interior, the holograms floating like cold ghosts.
camara: a slow drift revealing the space and the rotating data.
accion: the camera glides through the silent laboratory, past slowly turning holographic readouts and pale instruments, the temperature of the whole film dropping — a place where something has already gone quietly, terribly wrong.

secuencia: 3 — ESCENA: El laboratorio de Naio (la verdad y la huida)
encuadre: medium on the door as @StellaRopa steps in.
camara: a step-in follow as she crosses the threshold.
accion: the door breathes open and @StellaRopa strolls in still laughing, @Gix looping around her shoulders, the warmth of the park trailing in with her for one more second before the cold of the room reaches her.

secuencia: 3 — ESCENA: El laboratorio de Naio (la verdad y la huida)
encuadre: over-shoulder from @StellaRopa to her grim parents.
camara: a slow push as her smile drains away.
accion: @StellaRopa's grin fades by degrees as she reads the dread carved into @VeraArmadura and @Naio's faces; @Gix's glow dims and tucks behind her; the laughter dies in her throat, the room suddenly far too quiet.

secuencia: 3 — ESCENA: El laboratorio de Naio (la verdad y la huida)
encuadre: tight insert on the rotating hologram.
camara: a slow push into the holographic image of the dead core.
accion: the projection turns slowly, replaying the plunge into the planet's black empty heart, data-glyphs and warning-reds crawling around the dead core — the unspeakable truth rendered in cold light.

secuencia: 3 — ESCENA: El laboratorio de Naio (la verdad y la huida)
encuadre: two-shot; @Naio presses a suit into her hands.
camara: steady, intimate.
accion: @StellaArmadura takes the suit, confusion crossing her face, beginning to pull it on while searching her father's eyes for reassurance that doesn't come; @Naio's reply is clipped, urgent, gentle.

secuencia: 3 — ESCENA: El laboratorio de Naio (la verdad y la huida)
encuadre: close two-shot, @Naio leaning in low.
camara: a slow push to @Naio's half-shadowed face.
accion: @Naio lowers his voice almost to nothing, glancing toward the door, and speaks the forbidden thing aloud for the first time, every word costing him.

secuencia: 3 — ESCENA: El laboratorio de Naio (la verdad y la huida)
encuadre: medium, @Naio against the cold projection.
camara: a subtle push tightening on his face.
accion: @Naio gestures to the dying planet behind him and lands the truth like a stone; @StellaArmadura's face crumbles into disbelief, her newly-sealed suit suddenly meaningless against words this big.

secuencia: 3 — ESCENA: El laboratorio de Naio (la verdad y la huida)
encuadre: shot-reverse between their faces.
camara: steady, cutting closer with each line.
accion: @StellaArmadura protests, shaking her head, clinging to what she was taught; @Naio answers low and grim, the simple cruelty of it landing — the thing that gives life is exactly what the King means to steal.

secuencia: 3 — ESCENA: El laboratorio de Naio (la verdad y la huida)
encuadre: tight on @StellaArmadura's open hand beneath the device.
camara: a slow push to the hand as the light builds.
accion: @Naio guides @StellaArmadura's open hand under the device; petals of light fold inward and a glowing key-sigil burns itself into the skin of her palm; she sucks in a sharp breath and her fingers twitch, but she holds still, trusting him.

secuencia: 3 — ESCENA: El laboratorio de Naio (la verdad y la huida)
encuadre: extreme close-up of the palm.
camara: a micro push, the sigil pulsing under the skin.
accion: the @LlaveDeLuz pulses gently beneath @StellaArmadura's skin like a second small heart, light threading along faint veins — the quiet, fateful lock that the whole story will turn on, shown in a single held breath.

secuencia: 3 — ESCENA: El laboratorio de Naio (la verdad y la huida)
encuadre: close, @Naio folding her fingers shut over the sigil.
camara: steady, intimate.
accion: @Naio closes @StellaArmadura's fingers gently over the glowing mark and holds her fist in both of his, explaining the bond in a low, careful voice that makes it sound less like science and more like a vow.

secuencia: 3 — ESCENA: El laboratorio de Naio (la verdad y la huida)
encuadre: close on @StellaArmadura's eyes as the weight lands.
camara: a slow push to her face.
accion: @Naio holds her gaze without blinking, pressing the truth into her like a seal; @StellaArmadura's eyes widen as the size of it settles — she is not just carrying the Orb, she is the only one who can ever wield it.

secuencia: 3 — ESCENA: El laboratorio de Naio (la verdad y la huida)
encuadre: medium; @StellaArmadura crosses to the cradle.
camara: a follow to the baby, the tension momentarily breaking.
accion: @SelkaBebe stirs and breaks into a thin cry; without a thought @StellaArmadura abandons the gravity of the moment and goes straight to her little sister, the older-sister instinct overriding everything else in the room.

secuencia: 3 — ESCENA: El laboratorio de Naio (la verdad y la huida)
encuadre: intimate close two-shot of the sisters' faces.
camara: a slow, gentle push.
accion: @StellaArmadura cups her palm and a spark of @Gix drops into it, dancing like a captured firefly; she leans down and presses her forehead softly to the baby's, and both sisters smile — the crying stops. This exact gesture is the seed that detonates at the climax; render it clearly and warmly.

secuencia: 3 — ESCENA: El laboratorio de Naio (la verdad y la huida)
encuadre: sustained tender close-up, foreheads together, both smiling.
camara: nearly still, barely breathing.
accion: the camera holds — too long, on purpose — on the two sisters smiling forehead to forehead, the baby's small hand reaching for Stella's nose; the single image the entire film will ask us to remember.

secuencia: 3 — ESCENA: El laboratorio de Naio (la verdad y la huida)
encuadre: medium; the parents' heads snap toward the door.
camara: a sharp tension-push toward the door and the moving shadow.
accion: the warmth shatters as heavy approaching footsteps echo down the corridor; @Naio and @VeraArmadura exchange one fast, wordless look that says the time they were dreading has arrived.

secuencia: 3 — ESCENA: El laboratorio de Naio (la verdad y la huida)
encuadre: close family huddle, hands gripping faces and shoulders.
camara: intimate, a slight nervous handheld.
accion: @Naio takes @StellaArmadura's face in both hands, fierce and fast, pressing the command into her; the four of them fold into one brief, crushing embrace, @SelkaBebe pressed between them, before they break apart with the footsteps almost at the door.

secuencia: 3 — ESCENA: El laboratorio de Naio (la verdad y la huida)
encuadre: wide low-angle on @Vorthan in the doorway, the robots as a dark mass behind.
camara: a slow push to his calm, friendly smile.
accion: the door opens and @Vorthan steps in with the easy warmth of a family friend dropping by, spreading his hands, the faceless @RobotImperial units filling the frame behind him — menace dressed as affection.

secuencia: 3 — ESCENA: El laboratorio de Naio (la verdad y la huida)
encuadre: dynamic wide; @Naio steps between them, a shield flares, @Vorthan strikes him down.
camara: a quick whip-pan and push as @StellaArmadura screams.
accion: @Naio throws himself forward and snaps up a crackling force-field to buy seconds; @Vorthan, almost gently, swats it apart and drops @Naio with a single pulse of energy (no blood, no wound); @StellaArmadura lunges with a scream as @VeraArmadura hauls her bodily toward the back exit.

secuencia: 4 — ESCENA: Pasillos del palacio (la huida)
encuadre: tracking wide, the two running straight toward camera.
camara: a fast Steadicam retreat ahead of them down the corridor.
accion: @VeraArmadura and @StellaArmadura sprint down the grand corridor, @SelkaBebe clutched tight to Vera's chest, banners and gilded arches flashing past in pulses of red, the low hum of robot drones swelling somewhere behind them.

secuencia: 4 — ESCENA: Pasillos del palacio (la huida)
encuadre: running two-shot, profiles side by side.
camara: lateral tracking locked to them.
accion: @VeraArmadura, breathless and fierce, turns her head to @StellaArmadura mid-stride and lays down the brutal law of the night — the Orb above all, above even the people running beside her — the words landing harder than the alarm.

secuencia: 4 — ESCENA: Pasillos del palacio (la huida)
encuadre: close on @StellaArmadura's wet eyes, cutting to @VeraArmadura's impossible smile.
camara: tight tracking on their faces.
accion: @StellaArmadura answers through brimming tears, jaw set; @VeraArmadura meets her with a smile that has no business existing in this moment — a mother's reassurance offered while sprinting for their lives.

secuencia: 4 — ESCENA: Pasillos del palacio (la huida)
encuadre: running two-shot, Vera pointing ahead.
camara: tracking with urgency.
accion: @VeraArmadura flings out an arm toward a far junction as they run, shouting the escape plan over the rising alarm, her certainty the only thing holding the moment together.

secuencia: 4 — ESCENA: Pasillos del palacio (la huida)
encuadre: dynamic wide; a wall explodes, robots flood in.
camara: energetic handheld weaving through the fight.
accion: a wall blows inward and faceless @RobotImperial units swarm; @VeraArmadura fights one-armed with the baby pinned to her chest while @StellaArmadura ducks and strikes with quick agile bursts (energy and motion, no firearms), the two carving a desperate path forward through the chaos.

secuencia: 4 — ESCENA: Pasillos del palacio (la huida)
encuadre: dynamic action wide tracking her through the fight.
camara: fast handheld + whip-pan following the redirect.
accion: @StellaArmadura flips over a lunging @RobotImperial, hooks its arm and redirects its strike into a second unit, then lands in a low crouch, white braid snapping — agile, lethal, fast.

secuencia: 4 — ESCENA: Pasillos del palacio (la huida)
encuadre: medium tracking her advance, impact frames.
camara: handheld punching in on each hit.
accion: @VeraArmadura, the baby clamped to her chest with one arm, drives an energy-charged palm into a robot's core; it folds; the corridor strobes red with each impact as she carves a path forward.

secuencia: 4 — ESCENA: Pasillos del palacio (la huida)
encuadre: wide; the two reach the towering doors.
camara: a push toward the opening doors and the warm glow spilling out.
accion: @VeraArmadura and @StellaArmadura skid up to the colossal doors of the Orb chamber; the doors part with a deep resonant groan and a flood of warm sacred light pours over their faces — the goal, finally in reach.

secuencia: 5 — ESCENA: La sala del Orbe (la caída de Vera)
encuadre: vast wide of the chamber and the floating Orb.
camara: a slow reverent crane up and forward across the mirror-floor.
accion: the camera glides into the immense holy chamber, the mirrored floor doubling everything, and rises toward the @Orbe hanging weightless at the center — a sphere of liquid light slowly turning, exhaling rings of glow across the arches with each pulse, dwarfing the tiny figures entering below.

secuencia: 5 — ESCENA: La sala del Orbe (la caída de Vera)
encuadre: wide as they burst in, the Orb framed ahead.
camara: a push-in with them toward the sphere.
accion: @VeraArmadura and @StellaArmadura stumble through the great doors into the radiance, the @Orbe pulsing ahead of them like a second sun; for a breath the chaos behind is forgotten in the sheer presence of the thing they came to save.

secuencia: 5 — ESCENA: La sala del Orbe (la caída de Vera)
encuadre: wide symmetrical; the family at one side, @Vorthan entering opposite, the Orb suspended between.
camara: a slow lateral move holding the standoff.
accion: across the immense floor, a far door opens and @Vorthan steps in at the very same moment, unhurried, hands folded; the two parties freeze, separated by the glowing Orb — one held, suspended breath before the race detonates.

secuencia: 5 — ESCENA: La sala del Orbe (la caída de Vera)
encuadre: symmetrical wide composition — @StellaArmadura centered, the @Orbe on one side, her mother on the other; the visual of her impossible choice (duty vs love).
camara: held, balanced, almost motionless.
accion: the staging itself tells it: @StellaArmadura stands dead center of the great hall, the @Orbe glowing to her left, @VeraArmadura to her right, her body torn between the duty her father gave her and the mother she loves — the thematic image of the entire film, held in perfect, terrible balance.

secuencia: 5 — ESCENA: La sala del Orbe (la caída de Vera)
encuadre: @VeraArmadura shouting, snap to @StellaArmadura breaking into a sprint toward the Orb.
camara: a snap-pan from @VeraArmadura to @StellaArmadura exploding into a run.
accion: @VeraArmadura screams the order and shoves Stella forward; @StellaArmadura bolts across the mirror-floor toward the @Orbe, the standoff shattering into desperate speed.

secuencia: 5 — ESCENA: La sala del Orbe (la caída de Vera)
encuadre: dynamic medium; @VeraArmadura fighting one-armed, the baby shielded against her.
camara: handheld locked to her struggle.
accion: @RobotImperial units converge on @VeraArmadura; she fights savagely with one arm while the other cradles @SelkaBebe, kicking and twisting to keep the baby clear, unable to follow her daughter across the hall.

secuencia: 5 — ESCENA: La sala del Orbe (la caída de Vera)
encuadre: medium, she spins inside a ring of robots.
camara: orbiting handheld, whip-pans to each threat.
accion: surrounded, @VeraArmadura spins through the ring of @RobotImperial units — kicking, elbowing, the baby pressed tight; a unit clamps her arm and she wrenches free with a cry, never dropping @SelkaBebe.

secuencia: 5 — ESCENA: La sala del Orbe (la caída de Vera)
encuadre: wide, she skids across the mirror-floor and rises.
camara: camera drops with her, then snaps up as she plants.
accion: an energy blast skids @VeraArmadura across the mirror-floor; she is already scrambling up, planting herself again between the machines and the baby's niche, teeth bared, refusing to stay down.

secuencia: 5 — ESCENA: La sala del Orbe (la caída de Vera)
encuadre: low menacing wide as @S1G1 strides in; cut to @VeraArmadura's dawning realization.
camara: a slow push to @S1G1's single glowing optic, then to @VeraArmadura's face.
accion: the dark assassin @S1G1 walks in slow and silent where the other robots are loud, its one optic fixing on @VeraArmadura; her face changes as she understands — this is not a fight to win, it is an execution sent for her.

secuencia: 5 — ESCENA: La sala del Orbe (la caída de Vera)
encuadre: medium; @VeraArmadura tucks the baby into a safe niche, then turns and plants her stance.
camara: a settle as she squares up.
accion: @VeraArmadura kisses @SelkaBebe's forehead and tucks her deep into a recessed panel, out of the line of danger, then rises and turns to face @S1G1 alone, planting her feet between the machine and her child.

secuencia: 5 — ESCENA: La sala del Orbe (la caída de Vera)
encuadre: dynamic combat wide; @VeraArmadura gives everything, @S1G1 overpowers her.
camara: kinetic handheld through the exchange, then a hard beat as she's struck down.
accion: @VeraArmadura throws herself at @S1G1 with everything she has — strikes, a snatched weapon, raw desperation — but the machine is faster and stronger; with a single sweeping energy-wave it knocks her off her feet and she crashes to the mirror-floor, unhurt-looking but beaten.

secuencia: 5 — ESCENA: La sala del Orbe (la caída de Vera)
encuadre: tight combat, her three strikes landing.
camara: handheld pushing in with each blow.
accion: @VeraArmadura lands three blistering strikes on @S1G1, driving it back a full step — for one impossible beat she is winning; her face flares with ferocious hope.

secuencia: 5 — ESCENA: La sala del Orbe (la caída de Vera)
encuadre: tight, S1G1 catches her wrist and flurries.
camara: whip-pan + snap-zoom on the reversal.
accion: @S1G1 reads her, catches her wrist mid-swing and unleashes a blinding flurry; @VeraArmadura blocks on pure instinct, losing ground, her hope curdling into grim survival.

secuencia: 5 — ESCENA: La sala del Orbe (la caída de Vera)
encuadre: low on @VeraArmadura fallen, reaching out, the baby's niche beyond.
camara: a push to her face as she screams.
accion: sprawled on the floor, @VeraArmadura shoves herself up on one arm, flinging the other toward her daughter across the hall, and screams with everything left in her — the command and the goodbye fused into one word.

secuencia: 5 — ESCENA: La sala del Orbe (la caída de Vera)
encuadre: @StellaArmadura three steps from the Orb, hand outstretched — then she turns back toward her mother.
camara: a held beat on the reaching hand, then a whip as she reverses.
accion: @StellaArmadura's fingers are a breath from the @Orbe, its light flooding her hand — and then she looks back, sees her mother down and her sister's niche, and turns away from the Orb entirely, sprinting back toward @VeraArmadura, breaking the one rule her father gave her for the love she can't override.

secuencia: 5 — ESCENA: La sala del Orbe (la caída de Vera)
encuadre: @Vorthan catches @StellaArmadura by her long braid and lifts her dangling.
camara: a push to his cruel calm, then down to her kicking feet.
accion: @Vorthan's hand closes around @StellaArmadura's long white braid and hoists her off the floor, leaving her swinging and clawing at the air; he studies her struggle with serene, almost affectionate cruelty and speaks softly.

secuencia: 5 — ESCENA: La sala del Orbe (la caída de Vera)
encuadre: extreme insert + impact frame on the braid snapping taut.
camara: whip-pan as her head wrenches back, boots leaving the floor.
accion: @Vorthan's fist snaps @StellaArmadura's braid taut; her head wrenches back, strands tearing loose, her boots lifting off the floor — a single brutal impact frame of helpless force.

secuencia: 5 — ESCENA: La sala del Orbe (la caída de Vera)
encuadre: tight close-up of @StellaArmadura's face, hung by the hair, tears flying, unable to break free.
camara: a slow push into her anguish.
accion: held tight on @StellaArmadura's face — teeth bared, tears torn loose and floating in the charged air, hands wrenching uselessly at the braid that holds her — pure rage and helplessness as she's forced to watch what comes next.

secuencia: 5 — ESCENA: La sala del Orbe (la caída de Vera)
encuadre: wide catching @VeraArmadura's raised hands and the shield around @StellaArmadura, with @S1G1's light-lance descending behind @VeraArmadura; cut to Stella's scream.
camara: a wide that holds the shield and the killing light, then a snap to Stella. Death shown as her vital glow extinguishing — no blood, no wound.
accion: from the floor @VeraArmadura throws her hands up and a warm shield of light wraps protectively around @StellaArmadura; in the same instant, behind her, @S1G1 lowers a lance of light and a single flash passes through @VeraArmadura — her glow goes out like a snuffed flame, no blood, only light leaving her — and @StellaArmadura's scream tears across the hall.

secuencia: 5 — ESCENA: La sala del Orbe (la caída de Vera)
encuadre: fractured intercutting — @VeraArmadura's fading face mouthing a word / @StellaArmadura severing her braid with the light-blade.
camara: tight intercut, the two actions braided together.
accion: @VeraArmadura, the last of her light guttering out, shapes the word "Run" with no breath behind it; above, @StellaArmadura drags the @CuchilloLaser to the nape of her neck and a clean line of white light parts her white braid in a single stroke — the severed plait drifts away as she drops free and the protective shield dies with the last of @VeraArmadura's glow. No blood — only light leaving a body.

secuencia: 6 — ESCENA: Toma el Orbe / huida por el ducto
encuadre: tracking @StellaPeloCorto sprinting to the Orb, ducking a robot.
camara: a fast follow weaving with her.
accion: broken and tear-streaked but moving on instinct, @StellaPeloCorto sprints back across the mirror-floor toward the @Orbe, sliding under a @RobotImperial's grab and scrambling up without breaking stride, eyes locked on the sphere.

secuencia: 6 — ESCENA: Toma el Orbe / huida por el ducto
encuadre: close on her hand closing around the Orb, the palm-key igniting.
camara: a push as the Orb shrinks and pours into her hand.
accion: @StellaPeloCorto's hand closes around the @Orbe; the @LlaveDeLuz blazes awake in her palm and the great sphere collapses inward, streaming as liquid light into her hand until it pulses there beneath her skin — power and grief sealed together in one stroke.

secuencia: 6 — ESCENA: Toma el Orbe / huida por el ducto
encuadre: extreme close-up of the wrist monitor's bar filling to "MAX".
camara: a micro push on the readout.
accion: on @StellaPeloCorto's wrist the @MonitorMAX charge-bar floods from empty to full in a rush of light and locks at MAX, the readout pulsing — the clock that will return at the very end of the film, planted here in a single insert.

secuencia: 6 — ESCENA: Toma el Orbe / huida por el ducto
encuadre: low wide; thrusters fire, @StellaPeloCorto launches upward toward the ceiling duct.
camara: a fast tilt-up following her launch into the heights.
accion: @StellaPeloCorto's suit-thrusters ignite with a roar and she rockets straight up off the floor, threading toward a narrow duct high in the ceiling haze, the great chamber falling away beneath her boots.

secuencia: 6 — ESCENA: Toma el Orbe / huida por el ducto
encuadre: vertiginous vertical wide following her launch.
camara: fast tilt-up, the chamber falling away.
accion: @StellaPeloCorto rockets straight up past the cathedral arches, debris and pollen streaking past the lens, the vast chamber shrinking dizzyingly beneath her boots.

secuencia: 6 — ESCENA: Toma el Orbe / huida por el ducto
encuadre: @StellaPeloCorto's POV downward — her fallen mother and the crying baby, tiny and far below.
camara: a held beat, the image burning in before she tears away.
accion: for one suspended second @StellaPeloCorto looks down through the rising air at the small, still shape of her mother on the mirror-floor and the crying baby in the alcove — the last look, the image that will hollow her out for twenty years — then she wrenches her gaze away and dives into the duct.

secuencia: 6 — ESCENA: Toma el Orbe / huida por el ducto
encuadre: claustrophobic; @S1G1 thrusting up the duct inches from her boots.
camara: a fast forward track through the cramped tunnel.
accion: @StellaPeloCorto streaks up the narrow duct on her thrusters, walls a blur inches from her shoulders; below and behind, @S1G1's optic burns as it rockets after her, closing the gap until its claw scrapes the air just beneath her boots.

secuencia: 6 — ESCENA: Toma el Orbe / huida por el ducto
encuadre: claustrophobic; the claw raking sparks by her boot.
camara: snap-zoom to her face mid-scream.
accion: @S1G1's claw rakes a shower of sparks off the duct wall a hair from @StellaPeloCorto's boot; snap-zoom to her face mid-scream, the sound swallowed by the thruster roar.

secuencia: 6 — ESCENA: Toma el Orbe / huida por el ducto
encuadre: first-person urgency as the duct narrows.
camara: fast forward-track, walls squeezing in.
accion: the duct narrows hard ahead; @StellaPeloCorto tucks her arms and shoulders tight, metal shrieking inches past her, the strobing light quickening as the tube squeezes down.

secuencia: 6 — ESCENA: Toma el Orbe / huida por el ducto
encuadre: @S1G1 jams in the narrow opening; sparks; a clean blast hurls @StellaPeloCorto out into daylight.
camara: burst out of the dark tube into bright sky with her.
accion: @StellaPeloCorto shoots out of the duct mouth into open sky; right behind her @S1G1's larger frame wedges hard in the narrowing opening, throws sparks, and detonates in a clean burst of light and smoke, the shockwave flinging @StellaPeloCorto clear and tumbling into the air.

secuencia: 6 — ESCENA: Toma el Orbe / huida por el ducto
encuadre: tight detail on the wedging frame, optic flaring.
camara: slow push amid fast chaos, then sparks.
accion: @S1G1's bulk wedges in the throat of the duct, joints buckling, its single optic flaring red as it strains after her — sparks crawling up its frame an instant before it goes.

secuencia: 6 — ESCENA: Toma el Orbe / huida por el ducto
encuadre: @Vorthan lifts the baby from the alcove; robots move toward @VeraArmadura's body.
camara: slow, cold, deliberate.
accion: @Vorthan crosses the great floor and lifts @SelkaBebe gently from her niche; the baby quiets in his arms, grey-blue eyes wide; behind him @RobotImperial units stoop toward @VeraArmadura's still form.

secuencia: 6 — ESCENA: Toma el Orbe / huida por el ducto
encuadre: @Vorthan halts the robots with a gesture, turns away with the baby, leaving @VeraArmadura behind.
camara: a slow pull-back, leaving @VeraArmadura tiny and alone in the great room.
accion: @Vorthan raises a single hand and the robots freeze over @VeraArmadura's body; without a flicker of feeling he turns and walks out with the baby, his flat order echoing as the camera pulls back to leave @VeraArmadura alone on the immense floor.

secuencia: 7 — ESCENA: Persecución en el cielo / el sacrificio
encuadre: @StellaPeloCorto drops onto @VeraArmadura's hidden ship; trembling hands at the controls.
camara: tight in the small cockpit, then a jolt of ignition.
accion: @StellaPeloCorto crashes down onto @NaveStella, scrambles into the cockpit and slaps at the controls with shaking, fumbling hands, sobbing once before the engines catch and the canopy seals — survival on raw autopilot.

secuencia: 7 — ESCENA: Persecución en el cielo / el sacrificio
encuadre: wide, energy-fire raining as the ship lurches off.
camara: handheld shake, the nook erupting behind.
accion: imperial energy-fire rains on the terrace; @StellaPeloCorto's engines catch and @NaveStella lurches off the landing nook just as it erupts behind her in a clean burst of light.

secuencia: 7 — ESCENA: Persecución en el cielo / el sacrificio
encuadre: wide; @NaveStella lifts off as the @NaveImperial fleet rises on the horizon.
camara: rise with the ship, fleet looming beyond.
accion: @NaveStella tears up off the terrace into the open sky; ahead, across the golden horizon, a wall of cold @NaveImperial warships resolves out of the haze and turns toward her — the chase beginning.

secuencia: 7 — ESCENA: Persecución en el cielo / el sacrificio
encuadre: vast wide; the armada filling the frame, one small ship beneath it.
camara: a slow reveal pulling out to show the impossible odds.
accion: the camera widens to reveal the true scale — an armada of @NaveImperial ships blackening the sky, and beneath them @NaveStella a single glinting speck, hopelessly outnumbered.

secuencia: 7 — ESCENA: Persecución en el cielo / el sacrificio
encuadre: kinetic chase weaving between towers; pursuers clipping and crashing.
camara: a fast follow banking hard with the ship.
accion: @StellaPeloCorto flies like she was born to it, threading @NaveStella between honey-stone towers and under glowing bridges, juking so tight that two heavier @NaveImperial pursuers misjudge the gaps and slam into the architecture in clean bursts of light — but more keep coming.

secuencia: 7 — ESCENA: Persecución en el cielo / el sacrificio
encuadre: chase wide, threading a closing gap, inverted.
camara: camera bolted to the hull, banking hard.
accion: @StellaPeloCorto threads @NaveStella through a closing gap between two bridges, inverted, the hull scraping sparks; her hands a blur on the controls, eyes ice-cold.

secuencia: 7 — ESCENA: Persecución en el cielo / el sacrificio
encuadre: over-shoulder as a pursuer clips a tower behind her.
camara: whip-pan to the cartwheeling crash.
accion: an @NaveImperial ship misjudges the gap behind her, clips a honey-stone tower and cartwheels into a blooming fireball of clean light; debris rains past her canopy.

secuencia: 7 — ESCENA: Persecución en el cielo / el sacrificio
encuadre: an @NaveImperial ship frames @NaveStella; an energy beam charges.
camara: a tense tighten as the weapon builds.
accion: a heavy imperial ship slides in behind @NaveStella and locks her dead-center in its sights; its energy-cannon spools up with a rising whine, light gathering at the muzzle, the shot a heartbeat from firing.

secuencia: 7 — ESCENA: Persecución en el cielo / el sacrificio
encuadre: tight, she barrel-rolls off the lock at the last instant.
camara: whip-roll with the ship as the beam sears past.
accion: at the last instant @StellaPeloCorto barrel-rolls @NaveStella off the targeting lock; the energy beam sears past exactly where she was, close enough to wash the cockpit white.

secuencia: 7 — ESCENA: Persecución en el cielo / el sacrificio
encuadre: the pursuing ship explodes; @NaveAliada ships swoop in firing energy beams, carving a corridor.
camara: a whip to the rescue, energetic and sweeping.
accion: the @NaveImperial ship behind her erupts in a clean burst as a flight of @NaveAliada craft drops out of the sun, lancing energy-fire across the armada and tearing open a corridor of clear sky for @NaveStella to dive through.

secuencia: 7 — ESCENA: Persecución en el cielo / el sacrificio
encuadre: through-canopy as an allied ship slides into the beam.
camara: push to her eyes catching the sacrifice.
accion: an @NaveAliada ship slides deliberately into the beam meant for @StellaPeloCorto and blooms into light; through the canopy her eyes catch the pilot's silhouette an instant before it is gone.

secuencia: 7 — ESCENA: Persecución en el cielo / el sacrificio
encuadre: close on @Piloto1's resolute face in her cockpit.
camara: steady, intimate, holding her gaze.
accion: inside an @NaveAliada cockpit, @Piloto1 — steady, already at peace with how this ends — keys her comm and watches the battle through her canopy, fear nowhere on her face.

secuencia: 7 — ESCENA: Persecución en el cielo / el sacrificio
encuadre: intercut @NaveAliada ships shielding her / @StellaPeloCorto listening in her cockpit.
camara: steady on the radio voice, cutting to Stella's wet eyes.
accion: @Piloto1's voice comes over @StellaPeloCorto's radio, calm and final, as @NaveAliada ships slide deliberately into the line of fire to cover her; @StellaPeloCorto stares at the comm, understanding what they are choosing to do for her.

secuencia: 7 — ESCENA: Persecución en el cielo / el sacrificio
encuadre: close on @StellaPeloCorto crying in the cockpit, cut to the allied charge.
camara: tight on her face, then a whip to the sacrifice outside.
accion: @StellaPeloCorto shakes her head, crying out at the comm in protest, hands white on the controls; the radio voice answers with a last, gentle instruction as the @NaveAliada ships dive into the armada to hold the corridor open.

secuencia: 7 — ESCENA: Persecución en el cielo / el sacrificio
encuadre: @NaveAliada ships interpose and burst one by one; @StellaPeloCorto watches them die for her as she breaks for open space.
camara: her POV through the canopy at the sacrifice, then an acceleration away.
accion: one by one the @NaveAliada ships throw themselves into the armada and bloom into clean bursts of light, each death buying her a few more seconds; @StellaPeloCorto watches through the canopy, tears running, then hauls @NaveStella around and accelerates into the open dark, alone with everyone's sacrifice on her shoulders.

secuencia: 8 — ESCENA: Sin oxígeno / híper salto
encuadre: her path crossed by a burning allied ship shielding her.
camara: handheld of fugue, the wingmate spinning across frame.
accion: @Piloto2's burning @NaveAliada spins across @StellaPeloCorto's path, shielding her for the final seconds, before it too bursts into clean light; @StellaPeloCorto's face breaks as she punches for open space.

secuencia: 8 — ESCENA: Sin oxígeno / híper salto
encuadre: wide; the small ship adrift, the planet receding into the dark.
camara: a slow drift, vast and quiet.
accion: the roar of battle drops to absolute silence; @NaveStella coasts alone through the void while @Erdia dwindles behind it, golden and faintly sick, the whole world she lost shrinking to a point of light.

secuencia: 8 — ESCENA: Sin oxígeno / híper salto
encuadre: close on @StellaPeloCorto as a soft alarm pulses.
camara: a slow push to her slowing breath.
accion: a soft alarm begins to pulse — oxygen critical — and @StellaPeloCorto's breathing slows and shallows; she sits limp in the harness, tears sliding sideways, too hollowed-out to fight, the red light washing over her in time with her fading breaths.

secuencia: 8 — ESCENA: Sin oxígeno / híper salto
encuadre: extreme close-up on @StellaPeloCorto's eyes losing focus.
camara: a micro push with a soft rack into blur.
accion: extreme close on @StellaPeloCorto's grey-amber eyes as they drift and unfocus, lids growing heavy, the world sliding out of focus around the edges as she begins to black out.

secuencia: 8 — ESCENA: Sin oxígeno / híper salto
encuadre: she looks at her glowing palm, then presses it flat to the console.
camara: from her hand to the console flooding with light.
accion: half-conscious, @StellaPeloCorto lifts her hand and stares at the @LlaveDeLuz and the @Orbe glowing beneath her skin, then presses her open palm to the console in pure desperation; light floods out of her hand into the ship, panels igniting one after another.

secuencia: 8 — ESCENA: Sin oxígeno / híper salto
encuadre: energy floods the ship, everything overloads, then a blinding white hyperjump swallows the frame.
camara: a rush forward into a white bloom.
accion: the borrowed light overloads every system; @NaveStella shudders violently, seams blazing, and then snaps forward into a hyperjump — a blinding white flash tears the ship out of its universe and swallows the entire frame in white.

secuencia: 9 — ESCENA: El discurso de Vorthan (Erdia, Año 0)
encuadre: huge establishing wide over the gathered people toward the balcony.
camara: a slow crane over the sea of heads toward the distant King.
accion: the camera sails over a vast ocean of gathered citizens filling the plaza beneath banners and a blue sky, all faces turned up toward the small distant figure on the high balcony — a whole people about to be told who to hate.

secuencia: 9 — ESCENA: El discurso de Vorthan (Erdia, Año 0)
encuadre: strong medium of @Vorthan addressing the crowd, mournful and perfect.
camara: a slow push to his composed, sorrowful face.
accion: @Vorthan stands at the balcony's edge and lets a long, practiced silence hang before he speaks, his face a mask of shared grief, every gesture calculated to look like a man carrying his people's pain.

secuencia: 9 — ESCENA: El discurso de Vorthan (Erdia, Año 0)
encuadre: medium on @Vorthan, intercut with the horrified crowd.
camara: steady on him, then cutting down to the faces.
accion: @Vorthan names the loss with grave tenderness; the camera cuts to the crowd as a wave of gasps and grief ripples backward through the plaza, hands to mouths, the lie taking root.

secuencia: 9 — ESCENA: El discurso de Vorthan (Erdia, Año 0)
encuadre: medium on @Vorthan delivering the prophecy.
camara: a slow push.
accion: @Vorthan spreads his hands and foretells the planet's slow death, each phrase weighted to spread fear, the crowd below going silent and stricken beneath him.

secuencia: 9 — ESCENA: El discurso de Vorthan (Erdia, Año 0)
encuadre: wide revealing the caged, beaten allies behind/below him.
camara: a slow lateral move past the cages.
accion: the camera drifts across rows of cages flanking the balcony where the allies who saved @StellaPeloCorto stand captured and defeated, displayed to the crowd as proof — beaten but unbloodied — while @Vorthan gestures to them as traitors.

secuencia: 9 — ESCENA: El discurso de Vorthan (Erdia, Año 0)
encuadre: a montage of faces in the crowd shifting from grief to rage in real time.
camara: quick pushes across individual faces.
accion: the camera moves through the crowd catching faces mid-transformation — grief tightening into anger, tears drying into snarls, fists clenching — a people's love curdling into hatred before our eyes.

secuencia: 9 — ESCENA: El discurso de Vorthan (Erdia, Año 0)
encuadre: strong close on @Vorthan delivering the name like a sentence.
camara: a push to his calm, cruel face.
accion: @Vorthan lets the silence build, then hands the crowd their enemy — the name landing like a verdict, his sorrow never slipping even as the plaza erupts in fury beneath him.

secuencia: 9 — ESCENA: El discurso de Vorthan (Erdia, Año 0)
encuadre: @Vorthan holds @SelkaBebe before the crowd and, almost imperceptibly, strokes her head like a father; then to black.
camara: a slow push to the tender-yet-wrong gesture, then a fade to black.
accion: above the roaring crowd, @Vorthan lifts @SelkaBebe so all can see her, and — almost too small to notice — gently strokes her white hair like a doting father, the baby's grey-blue eyes blinking up at him; the image holds, intimate and deeply wrong, then cuts to black. END OF ACT 1.

secuencia: 10 — ESCENA: La nave nodriza / "te recogí" · *(89-95)*
encuadre: wide establishing of the cavernous bay.
camara: slow drift through the gloom toward the wreck.
accion: the camera glides through the immense, silent bay, revealing @NaveStella broken and held in the claws of something far older and bigger than anything on Erdia.

secuencia: 10 — ESCENA: La nave nodriza / "te recogí" · *(89-95)*
encuadre: close on @StellaPeloCorto waking, disoriented.
camara: a slow push as she checks her hand first.
accion: @StellaPeloCorto jolts awake on the metal floor; before anything else her eyes snap to her palm — the @LlaveDeLuz still glows, the @Orbe still inside — and a flicker of relief crosses her exhausted face.

secuencia: 10 — ESCENA: La nave nodriza / "te recogí" · *(89-95)*
encuadre: primerísimo plano on her face.
camara: slow push as grief crashes in.
accion: as she registers where she is, the grief of the escape crashes back over @StellaPeloCorto — her mother, the allies — her face crumpling before she forces it flat, utterly alone in a strange universe.

secuencia: 10 — ESCENA: La nave nodriza / "te recogí" · *(89-95)*
encuadre: a huge shadow resolves into @Theron.
camara: slow push to his unblinking eyes.
accion: a vast shadow shifts in the gloom and @Theron steps forward — tall, of another species, eyes that never blink, centuries worn into his face; @StellaPeloCorto scrambles back on guard.

secuencia: 10 — ESCENA: La nave nodriza / "te recogí" · *(89-95)*
encuadre: shot-reverse between them.
camara: steady, cold.
accion: @StellaPeloCorto, broken-voiced, asks if he saved her; @Theron answers without warmth.

secuencia: 10 — ESCENA: La nave nodriza / "te recogí" · *(89-95)*
encuadre: close on Theron eyeing the glow in her hand.
camara: slow push to the Orb's light under her skin.
accion: @Theron's gaze locks onto the light pulsing in her palm as he speaks, reading her like a trail rather than a person.

secuencia: 10 — ESCENA: La nave nodriza / "te recogí" · *(89-95)*
encuadre: primerísimo plano of her face and fist.
camara: micro push as she closes her hand.
accion: @StellaPeloCorto closes her fist over the light and hides it against her chest, a new fear dawning — to him she is not a rescued child but bait.

secuencia: 11 — ESCENA: Maltrato / Vosk / Brog y Nima / la dilatación · *(96-106)*
encuadre: wide of the hold, crew turning to look.
camara: slow track past hostile faces.
accion: @StellaPeloCorto moves through the grimy hold under the cold stares of a mismatched alien crew who clearly think she does not belong aboard.

secuencia: 11 — ESCENA: Maltrato / Vosk / Brog y Nima / la dilatación · *(96-106)*
encuadre: medium; a plate knocked to the floor.
camara: handheld, dismissive energy.
accion: crew shove past her, ignore her, and a passing hand knocks her food plate to the deck; @StellaPeloCorto watches it scatter, jaw tight.

secuencia: 11 — ESCENA: Maltrato / Vosk / Brog y Nima / la dilatación · *(96-106)*
encuadre: wide, small in the corner of the hold.
camara: static, the crew moving around her.
accion: @StellaPeloCorto folds into a corner of the hold, knees up, watching the strange alien crew move around her — bracing, out of place.

secuencia: 11 — ESCENA: Maltrato / Vosk / Brog y Nima / la dilatación · *(96-106)*
encuadre: low on @Vosk blocking her path, huge.
camara: push up to his sneer.
accion: @Vosk — big, scarred — steps into her path and looks her up and down, taunting.

secuencia: 11 — ESCENA: Maltrato / Vosk / Brog y Nima / la dilatación · *(96-106)*
encuadre: medium; she slaps his hand away, he grins and swings.
camara: snap-zoom on the first punch.
accion: @StellaPeloCorto smacks his prodding hand aside; @Vosk grins — exactly what he wanted — and throws the first heavy punch.

secuencia: 11 — ESCENA: Maltrato / Vosk / Brog y Nima / la dilatación · *(96-106)*
encuadre: dirty brawl, dynamic.
camara: fast handheld in the scuffle.
accion: @StellaPeloCorto is fast and slippery but small; @Vosk is a wall — he absorbs her hits, shrugs them off, and slams her back against the bulkhead.

secuencia: 11 — ESCENA: Maltrato / Vosk / Brog y Nima / la dilatación · *(96-106)*
encuadre: tight, her ducking and countering.
camara: whip-pans tracking her evasions.
accion: @StellaPeloCorto ducks two haymakers and lands a quick three-hit combo on @Vosk's ribs — it barely moves him, but her face is pure refusal-to-quit; he wipes his mouth, almost impressed.

secuencia: 11 — ESCENA: Maltrato / Vosk / Brog y Nima / la dilatación · *(96-106)*
encuadre: tight, he hurls her into the lockers.
camara: whip + impact frame, she rolls clear.
accion: @Vosk catches her mid-combo and hurls @StellaPeloCorto into a wall of lockers; she crashes, rolls clear and comes up in a low crouch, breathing hard but unbroken.

secuencia: 11 — ESCENA: Maltrato / Vosk / Brog y Nima / la dilatación · *(96-106)*
encuadre: a giant stone hand enters frame and lifts Vosk away.
camara: settle as Brog plants between them — a frame of weight.
accion: a massive stone hand closes on @Vosk's shoulder and peels him off effortlessly; @Brog — a silent rock giant — plants himself between them and simply stands there.

secuencia: 11 — ESCENA: Maltrato / Vosk / Brog y Nima / la dilatación · *(96-106)*
encuadre: medium on @Nima, four hands working without looking up.
camara: gentle, settling.
accion: @Nima, four arms busy at once, talks to @StellaPeloCorto without lifting her eyes; @Brog sits down beside the girl in silence.

secuencia: 11 — ESCENA: Maltrato / Vosk / Brog y Nima / la dilatación · *(96-106)*
encuadre: two-shot, the small girl beside the rock giant.
camara: still, quiet.
accion: @StellaPeloCorto sits against @Brog's vast stone side; he doesn't comfort her, just stays — and she lets out a long breath, the first thread of belonging.

secuencia: 11 — ESCENA: Maltrato / Vosk / Brog y Nima / la dilatación · *(96-106)*
encuadre: close two-shot, the cruel truth landing.
camara: slow push to her face as it sinks in.
accion: @Theron tells her the worst part flatly; @StellaPeloCorto's face slowly registers the size of it — every day lost here is four lost at home.

secuencia: 12 — ESCENA: [AÑO 8] La resistencia / Marek / la encapuchada · *(104-108)*
encuadre: wide establishing of the decaying city.
camara: slow mournful drift over the rot.
accion: the camera glides over Erdia eight years on — the warm gold gone grey, light-water guttering, machinery and smoke where gardens used to be.

secuencia: 12 — ESCENA: [AÑO 8] La resistencia / Marek / la encapuchada · *(104-108)*
encuadre: detail of a thin grey light-water canal; a ragged child crouched.
camara: slow drift to the dimming water.
accion: a once-bright luzagua canal runs thin and grey; a hungry child watches the light gutter — the planet's slow death in one small image.

secuencia: 12 — ESCENA: [AÑO 8] La resistencia / Marek / la encapuchada · *(104-108)*
encuadre: warm medium on @Marek among his people.
camara: slow push to his face.
accion: @Marek — warm-voiced, the kind people follow — speaks to a circle of worn, hungry naieli who hang on his hope.

secuencia: 12 — ESCENA: [AÑO 8] La resistencia / Marek / la encapuchada · *(104-108)*
encuadre: montage of gaunt hopeful faces.
camara: slow pushes across faces.
accion: the camera moves over gaunt, hopeful faces lit by lamplight — varied people, not all white-haired — clinging to @Marek's words.

secuencia: 12 — ESCENA: [AÑO 8] La resistencia / Marek / la encapuchada · *(104-108)*
encuadre: medium, intercut with nodding faces.
camara: steady.
accion: @Marek plants the doubt that holds them together; the people nod, given a different enemy.

secuencia: 12 — ESCENA: [AÑO 8] La resistencia / Marek / la encapuchada · *(104-108)*
encuadre: medium on the hooded figure beside Marek.
camara: slow push that never reveals the face.
accion: beside @Marek stands a silent @VeraEncapuchada — strong woman's hands, a strand of white hair escaping the hood — face unseen.

secuencia: 12 — ESCENA: [AÑO 8] La resistencia / Marek / la encapuchada · *(104-108)*
encuadre: close on the hood and hidden jaw.
camara: held, intimate, withholding.
accion: the hooded figure watches @Marek and the people, then lowers her head — a private grief we can't read yet.

secuencia: 13 — ESCENA: La misión / la traición de Vosk / la captura · *(109-114)*
encuadre: wide establishing over the scrap dunes.
camara: slow sweep, the crew tiny among wrecks.
accion: Theron's crew, @StellaPeloCorto now older and harder among them, picks through a vast graveyard of dead ships on a scrap world.

secuencia: 13 — ESCENA: La misión / la traición de Vosk / la captura · *(109-114)*
encuadre: crew clambering through towering dead hulls.
camara: slow sweep, tiny against the scrap.
accion: the crew clambers through towering dead hulls, salvaging, tiny against a sky of scrap, @StellaPeloCorto among them.

secuencia: 13 — ESCENA: La misión / la traición de Vosk / la captura · *(109-114)*
encuadre: sudden wide as bounty hunters spring the trap.
camara: fast whip into chaos.
accion: local @CazadorRecompensas erupt from the wrecks in an ambush; the crew scatters into chaos and dust.

secuencia: 13 — ESCENA: La misión / la traición de Vosk / la captura · *(109-114)*
encuadre: she hides; cut to @Vosk seeing her across the field.
camara: tense, still, then a snap between their eyes.
accion: @StellaPeloCorto presses into a crevice, safe and unseen — until @Vosk spots her from across the scrap; their eyes meet and hold.

secuencia: 13 — ESCENA: La misión / la traición de Vosk / la captura · *(109-114)*
encuadre: insert of Vosk's hand taking a stone; he throws it.
camara: snap to the clang beside her.
accion: @Vosk's hand closes on a rock; he hurls it to clang against the metal right beside her hiding spot — a deliberate, ugly tell.

secuencia: 13 — ESCENA: La misión / la traición de Vosk / la captura · *(109-114)*
encuadre: Vosk shouting, hunters converging.
